title: calchas claessensii
side_effects: Calchas claessensii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in sensitive individuals. Overconsumption of its extracts can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its toxic compounds. Furthermore, using the plant's essential oils without proper dilution can cause skin irritation, such as redness, inflammation, and even burns in some cases. Additionally, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause kidney damage and other organ failures, emphasizing the need for caution and proper medical supervision.
